title: Javascript Intern
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are looking for a motivated and passionate JavaScript Developer Intern to join our development team. This role is ideal for someone eager to gain hands-on experience in JavaScript development and learn from experienced developers in a dynamic environment.
 
Responsibilities: 
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain web applications.
Participate in the full software development lifecycle, including requirements gathering, design, coding, testing, and deployment.
Develop and maintain software applications using JavaScript.
Assist with the implementation of new technology and IT projects.
Communicate effectively with international team members in English, including documenting code and processes clearly.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Requirements:
Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) to collaborate effectively in an international environment..
Basic understanding of JavaScript and TypeScript for building simple applications.
Has basic experience with at least one popular JavaScript framework or library like React, React Native, or Node.js.
Strong willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies and development tools.
Good problem-solving and analytical thinking skills.
Basic understanding of Git or other version control systems.
 
Nice-to-Haves:
Basic understanding or hands-on experience with Docker for containerization and deployment.
Familiarity with RESTful APIs and integration between front-end and back-end systems.
Knowledge of databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL, including basic CRUD operations.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


8seneca is committed to building a workplace where employees can grow, contribute, and thrive.
1. Engaging perks and benefits for your well-being
We offer a competitive package including 13th-month salary, on-time salary payments, and project bonuses based on revenue. Employees are fully covered with 100% salary-based insurance, advanced healthcare insurance, annual health check-ups, and Tet/holiday gifts.
Work-life balance is supported with 14 days annual leave plus 3 Christmas days, flexible working arrangements (3 days WFH for senior lever up), modern office facilities, team-building trips (4D3N at 5-star resorts), and wellness support such as vitamins in the office. In addition, the office provides coffee machines, snacks, and fresh fruits to support daily comfort and energy.
2. World-class technology and impactful projects
You will work with modern technologies in AI, Data, Cloud, and Software Engineering on large-scale international projects for European clients, including strategic initiatives for our company—one of the top IT companies in Europe. We also provide access to modern AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude Code to support productivity and engineering excellence.
3. A culture of growth, collaboration, and learning
We foster continuous learning through mentorship programs, 1-1 feedback, and performance reviews. Employees are empowered to take ownership, make decisions, and learn from mistakes in a safe, supportive environment. A shared company library also promotes continuous self-development.
At 8seneca, you will work with talented people from diverse backgrounds, united by a passion for technology and innovation.

title: Fullstack Developer (NodeJS, Python, AI, SQL)
company: CÔNG TY TNHH CÔNG NGHỆ HAIPER-X
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Thông tin chung
- Công ty Haiper-X (Chuyên về mảng IT)
- Vị trí: Kỹ Sư AI Full-Stack 
- Địa điểm: Đường N3C, The Global City, Bình Trưng, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh
- Thời gian làm việc: Theo lịch làm việc và chế độ nghỉ của Bộ Luật Lao Động Việt Nam
Mô tả công việc
🛠 
KỸ SƯ AI FULL-STACK
💰 Mức lương: Thỏa thuận theo năng lực (25.000.000 - 45.000.000 VND)
Cách thức ứng tuyển
CV, portfolio và link GitHub là bắt buộc. Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi sẽ đánh giá kỹ phần trả lời của các bạn cho 3 câu hỏi bên dưới hơn cả cover letter (Đây là bước lọc hồ sơ quan trọng.)
1. Một thứ bạn tự hào nhất đã làm bằng AI trong 3 tháng gần đây. (Link + 1–2 dòng mô tả)
2. Mô tả ngắn gọn về AI workflow của riêng bạn. Bạn giải quyết vấn đề gì, bằng tổ hợp công cụ nào?
 3. Có phần nào trong tin tuyển dụng này bạn không đồng ý? (Không có đáp án đúng. Hãy thành thật bày tỏ suy nghĩ của bạn.)
📁 Tiêu đề email: 
[Apply] AI Full-Stack / Họ và tên
*** Quy Trình Tuyển Dụng
 
1. Vòng hồ sơ
 (3 câu hỏi trên + portfolio + GitHub)
 
2. Soft Online Meeting
 3. Bài test kĩ thuật
Bài tập System Design + bài test coding Python cơ bản (Easy / Medium)
4. Phỏng vấn trực tiếp
 
5. Onboarding:
 Thường hoàn tất trong vòng 1 tuần. Vì công ty chúng tôi làm việc với tốc độ rất nhanh.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Yêu cầu cơ bản:
Kinh nghiệm:
 Có 3~5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, tư duy full-stack nhưng có chuyên môn sâu về 
Backend
 (Node.js, Python, hoặc các ngôn ngữ server-side mạnh mẽ).
Năng lực Machine Learning:
 Có kinh nghiệm thực chiến trong việc thiết kế, xây dựng và tối ưu các pipeline ML. Thành thạo xử lý dữ liệu (data wrangling/feature engineering) cho các bài toán phân loại (classification), dự báo (forecasting) và phát hiện bất thường (anomaly detection).
Năng lực Computer Vision:
 Am hiểu về xử lý hình ảnh/video, nhận diện vật thể, trích xuất dữ liệu từ hình ảnh (OCR/Metadata extraction) và các kỹ thuật liên quan đến phân tích hành vi.
Kinh nghiệm LLM & NLP:
 Có khả năng ứng dụng các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLM) vào sản phẩm thực tế. Thành thạo Prompt Engineering, fine-tuning cơ bản, kỹ thuật RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) và xử lý đầu ra có cấu trúc (Structured Output/JSON) để tích hợp vào hệ thống backend.
Cơ sở dữ liệu:
 Nắm vững tư duy thiết kế Database (Relational DB như PostgreSQL/MySQL), tối ưu hóa truy vấn, cấu trúc index và quản lý dữ liệu hiệu quả.
Tiếng Anh:
 Trình độ Business (đọc hiểu tài liệu chuyên môn, làm việc và giao tiếp được bằng tiếng Anh).
Ưu tiên:
AI-Native:
 Đã từng phát triển sản phẩm end-to-end bằng các AI coding agent (như Claude Code / Codex / Cursor).
Kinh nghiệm triển khai:
 Đã từng đưa các hệ thống AI/ML/Agent lên môi trường production thực tế và tối ưu hiệu năng.
Tư duy hệ thống:
 Có khả năng thiết kế hệ thống backend có khả năng mở rộng (scalability) cao, giải quyết các bài toán về latency và data throughput.
Portfolio:
 Cung cấp được một dự án AI/ML/CV bạn đã tự mình launching từ 0→1.
Có khả năng giao tiếp tốt với PM và design về business.
Càng có nhiều kinh nghiệm thực hiện các dự án về ứng dụng AI thì càng được ưu tiên.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Bạn sẽ nhận được gì khi gia nhập công ty chúng tôi? 
Trải nghiệm trực tiếp launching nhiều service trong một năm. Nhiều dự án nội bộ + dự án outsourcing chạy song song.
Code và design của bạn không bị mục trong phòng chờ phê duyệt - đi thẳng lên production, có thể được đưa ra thị trường.
Trải nghiệm nhận feedback từ user thật ở thị trường toàn cầu, lấy Việt Nam làm điểm xuất phát.
Hợp tác với các CTO Hàn Quốc - mở rộng tầm nhìn kỹ thuật.
Toàn bộ lợi ích dành cho những thành viên gia nhập startup của chúng tôi từ giai đoạn sớm nhất. Hiện tại chính là “cơ hội vàng cuối cùng” để tham gia.

title: Android Developer (Kotlin) Up To 45M
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Android App Development:
Design, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, and reliable Kotlin code for Android applications.
Collaborate with Product Owners and cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features.
Ensure the best possible performance, quality, and responsiveness of the applications.
Identify and correct bottlenecks and fix bugs.
Help maintain code quality, organization, and automatization.
App Operations and Collaboration:
Work closely with backend developers (client/server) to integrate APIs and resolve issues.
Participate in code reviews, testing, and deployment processes.
Continuously discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to maximize development efficiency.
Coordinate with UX/UI designers, testers, and other departments to deliver seamless user experiences.
Contribute to all phases of the development lifecycle, including mobile app design, development, and iteration.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Knowledge and Experience:
At least 2 years of experience in Android development with Kotlin
At least 6 month of experience in Jetpack Compose
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.
Strong knowledge of Android SDK, different versions of Android, and how to deal with different screen sizes.
Solid understanding of mobile app architecture, UI/UX standards, and best practices.
Preferred:
 Experience working with Agile methodologies, RESTful APIs, and tools like Firebase or Google Analytics.
Skills:
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
Proficient in Kotlin, Java, and modern Android development tools (Android Studio, Jetpack Compose, Jetpack components, etc.)
Familiarity with version control systems (e.g., Git).
Strong communication skills and ability to work in a team environment.
Willingness to learn, research, and stay updated with new technologies.
Patient and proactive in handling challenges and feedback.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Attractive salary range: 20,000,000 - 45,000,000 VND (negotiable based on experience).
Salary reviews twice a year
Performance bonuses twice a year, plus hot bonuses, 13th-month salary, birthday bonuses, holiday bonuses (including all national holidays, 8/3, 20/10, International Men's Day 19/11), and special occasion gifts (weddings, funerals, etc.).
Private health insurance (PVI Care) for employees and their family members.
15 annual leave days per year + 1 birthday leave day.
Daily lunch allowance: 35,000 VND/day.
Annual company trip (including international travel), regular health check-ups, special event celebrations, and daily tea breaks.
Opportunity to work on large-scale mobile apps for global markets (US, Australia, etc.).
Clear career progression path with dedicated training to advance to senior or leadership roles for high-potential employees. Personalized training and development support for each employee.
Fun company activities including team building, entertainment, free teabreak, coffee,...
Friendly and supportive work environment where team members grow together

title: Lead Java Engineer
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Itviec’s client 
is
 
seeking a Lead Java Engineer 
to lead the design and development of backend services for large‑scale digital banking and financial platforms. 
The role requires strong expertise in system architecture and design, microservices backend engineering, and understanding of banking / financial service domains, along with the ability to lead engineering teams and communicate confidently with client stakeholders to deliver scalable, secure and high-quality backend solutions. 
 
Key Responsibilities
 
Technical Leadership 
Lead and mentor a team of backend engineers across multiple functional domains. 
Provide technical direction and ensure alignment with architecture standards and engineering best practices. 
Review solution designs, code quality, and implementation approaches — promoting clean architecture, resilient microservices, and AI‑enhanced development patterns. 
Guide the team in diagnosing complex technical challenges, using both traditional analysis and AI-powered debugging or observability tools. 
Support planning, estimation, and technical decision-making within the engineering team. 
Backend Architecture & Development 
Design and develop backend services using Java and modern backend frameworks (e.g., Spring Boot). 
Define and implement microservices-based architecture and API-driven systems. 
Ensure backend services are scalable, secure, resilient, and maintainable. 
Drive best practices in backend development, including maintainable system design, automated testing, code quality, API governance, performance optimization and documentation. 
Work closely with DevOps teams to support CI/CD pipelines, incorporate intelligent automation, and ensure stable, secure deployment environments. 
Integrate AI-assisted development practices into coding, testing, documentation, code reviews, and defect prevention workflows. 
Banking & Payment Domain 
Design backend systems supporting banking products and financial transaction processing. 
Build and maintain services related to payments, card processing, financial operations, and core banking functions. 
Ensure backend implementations comply with financial industry standards and security requirements. 
Collaborate with business and product teams to translate banking and financial requirements into technical solutions. 
Client Collaboration & Delivery 
Work directly with client stakeholders, architects, and product owners to understand business processes, requirements and define technical solutions. 
Challenge and clarify requirements with curiosity dig deep into the "why" behind business needs. 
Participate in architecture discussions and technical workshops with client teams. 
Communicate technical designs, trade-offs, and solutions clearly to both engineering teams and non-technical stakeholders. 
Support project delivery by ensuring technical risks are identified and mitigated early.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field 
8+ years of backend development experience. 
3+ years in a Technical Lead or senior engineering role. 
Strong experience with Java and backend frameworks (e.g. Spring Boot). 
Experience designing and implementing microservices, API-driven systems, event-driven architectures or messaging systems (e.g., Kafka), RDBMS and SQL. 
Solid experience working with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes). 
Strong understanding of CI/CD, version control (Git), and automated pipelines. 
Experience working in Agile delivery environments. 
Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills. 
Specific Qualifications 
Experience working in banking, fintech, or financial services environments. 
Familiarity with core banking, card, payment systems, or related financial systems. 
Knowledge of industry standards (e.g. PCI-DSS) or payment security practices. 
Handson exposure to AIassisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, or similar). 
Ability to write effective prompts and context for AI code generation. 
Ability to assess AI-generated code, verify security vulnerabilities, validate AI-generated tests for completeness and edge case coverage. 
Nice-to-Have 
Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) 
Familiarity with modern API architectures such as GraphQL or BFF patterns 
Experience working with mobile-first platforms or digital banking applications 
What Makes You Successful in This Role 
You are experienced engineer with great mindset in leading end-to-end technical delivery and problem solving, forward thinking in applying AI-assisted solutions to optimize productivity, and willingness in mentoring others.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Our client is 
an AI-centric global digital transformation company. We design advanced data and AI transformation solutions, modernize technology architectures and develop next-generation core systems for industry leaders in Banking, Insurance, Manufacturing and Robotics
 
HR benefits
Competitive salary
Salary band per level are reviewed once per year
13th month salary pro rata depending on the employee’s length of service (within a calender year), paid with the December salary
Monthly lunch allowance: 700,000 VND/employee
Parking: covers the monthly parking fee for employee motorbikes
Health care
Private health insurance: including accident, outpatient, in-patient, maternity, and dental for all permanent employees who pass 2-month probation.
Optical: expense claim for eyewear
Annual health check-ups.
Vacation
Maximum 18-day vacation leave/year (with the ability to carry over 05 days till 31st March of the following year)
Adding one more annual leave day for each two-year anniversary.
Healthy lifestyle
Sports and hobby clubs: company has an annual fund for fitness activities, which is allocated per month as team’s vote.
Range of healthy snacks, tea, coffee, milk and beer on tap

title: Middle/ Senior Backend Developer (PHP, Kafka, MySQL)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Job Summary
We are looking for a Middle/ Senior Backend Developer to join our engineering team. You will design, develop, and optimize scalable backend systems using Laravel, Kafka, MySQL, AWS, and Graylog. This role involves building high-performance applications, optimizing system reliability, and mentoring team members while collaborating with cross-functional teams.
Key Responsibilities
Backend Development
Lead the design and implementation of scalable, secure applications with Laravel.
Architect and maintain RESTful APIs and services with a focus on scalability.
Develop and optimize components handling high traffic and large data volumes.
Database Management
Build, optimize, and maintain MySQL databases for high performance and availability.
Ensure data integrity through schema design, indexing strategies, and query optimization.
Implement data migrations and transformations as required.
Monitoring & Performance
Set up and manage observation tools for logging, monitoring, and alerting.
Continuously analyze system performance and implement improvements.
Optimize code, queries, and infrastructure to minimize latency and maximize efficiency.
Mentorship & Leadership
Mentor junior/mid-level developers and guide them through technical challenges.
Lead by example with clean code, code reviews, and best practices.
Foster a culture of learning and technical excellence.
Collaboration & Communication
Work closely with Product, Design, and Operations teams to deliver features on time.
Communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Participate in architecture reviews, sprint planning, and agile ceremonies.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Technical Skills
Expert-level experience with Laravel and modern PHP practices.
Experience with Kafka for real-time data streaming.
Advanced knowledge of MySQL (performance tuning, indexing, optimization).
Hands-on experience with AWS services (EC2, S3, RDS, CloudWatch, Lambda).
Experience with Graylog or similar log management tools.
Strong background in performance optimization for backend and databases.
Experience
4+ years in backend development, with proven experience in high-traffic applications.
Track record in building and maintaining scalable, production-level systems.
Experience with microservices or distributed systems.
Experience with IFRS/CRM/Accounting systems is a plus.
Excellent problem-solving and debugging skills under pressure.
Strong communication skills, both technical and non-technical.
Proactive, self-driven, and adaptable in a fast-paced environment.
Nice to have
Experience with Golang is a plus.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


85% salary during probation.
Attractive salary package, including 13th-month bonus.
Provided with MacBook & iPhone 16e.
Premium healthcare package.
Monthly Happy Hour & annual company trips.
Opportunity to improve English skills with international clients.
Exposure to new tech stacks for business growth.
Flexible working hours & attractive annual leave policy.

title: Frontend Developer (ReactJS/ TypeScript/ Graphql)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Chúng tôi là 
 đang xây dựng nền tảng E-commerce, phục vụ các nghiệp vụ quản lý sản phẩm, đơn hàng, khách hàng và vận hành hệ thống.
Dự án được phát triển từ đầu với React, TypeScript, GraphQL, Tailwind CSS và hệ thống design token được thiết kế trên Figma.
Mô tả công việc
Bạn sẽ chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng các feature chính cho Admin Dashboard, không chỉ triển khai UI mà còn thiết lập pattern, cấu trúc và data flow cho toàn bộ admin dashboard.
Nhiệm vụ chính:
Kế thừa và phát triển dự án React + TypeScript
Phát triển data flow cho toàn bộ dashboard
Thiết kế và triển khai feature end-to-end cho Admin Dashboard
Làm việc với GraphQL query / mutation / pagination / filter / sort
Quản lý server state bằng React Query (cache, invalidate, loading/error state)
Chuẩn hoá pattern cho table, form, dialog
Viết và quản lý TypeScript type cho domain (Order, Product, Customer…)
Phát triển UI dựa trên Tailwind CSS và design token từ Figma
Refactor code và thiết lập convention cho team frontend

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Bắt buộc:
Có từ 
2 năm kinh nghiệm
 làm Frontend với React và TypeScript.
Đã từng tự khởi tạo hoặc tham gia setup project React + TypeScript.
Có hiểu biết tốt về nền tảng Web: Browser, DOM, HTML, CSS và cơ chế render UI.
Thành thạo React ở mức thực tế:
Custom hooks.
Component composition.
Props/state management.
Tách logic và UI hợp lý.
Thành thạo TypeScript:
Generics.
Union / intersection types.
Type narrowing.
Type modeling cho API data và UI state.
Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với GraphQL.
Hiểu quản lý state frontend, đặc biệt là server state/client state; đã từng dùng React Query, Zustand hoặc công cụ tương đương.
Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng UI bằng Tailwind CSS trong dự án thực tế.
Có khả năng đọc, phân tích và refactor codebase React + TypeScript hiện có.
Có tư duy code rõ ràng, dễ maintain, phù hợp với team product.
CỘNG ĐIỂM:
Đã từng xây dựng Admin Dashboard / E-commerce từ giai đoạn đầu
Biết Shadcn / Radix UI hoặc component library tương tự
Biết thiết lập design token / system từ Figma
Có kinh nghiệm xử lý permission / role trong UI
Có tư duy sản phẩm, chú trọng UX consistency và chi tiết.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Làm sản phẩm E-commerce thực tế, domain phức tạp
Làm việc trực tiếp với Founder
Có lộ trình phát triển lên Quản lý dự án hoặc Full-Stack engineer
Môi trường năng động, tích cực
Xét duyệt tăng lương định kỳ 2 lần/năm
Tham gia BHXH đầy đủ, lương tháng 13, thưởng lễ tết
Hỗ trợ phí gửi xe tại tòa nhà
Tham gia Team bonding, hoạt động sinh nhật hằng tháng
Pantry đầy đủ trà, cà phê, đồ ăn nhẹ

title: Web Frontend Engineer (ReactJS, JavaScript, Redux)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Gear Games develops iOS/Android games with high concurrent users and heavy network traffic in global markets (US, Europe, Arab). Alongside game development, we also build web-based platforms to support and enhance our gaming ecosystem.
To keep up with our growth, we are seeking a talented Web Frontend Engineer to design and optimize scalable, high-performance systems.
Your main responsibilities are:
Contribute to architectural design to ensure the scalability and efficiency of web solutions.
Implement new features as defined in the roadmap
Implement new web tools required by the game team
Enhance existing tools and features, optimizing them for better performance and usability
Debug and resolve issues to maintain seamless and stable performance
Perform other tasks as assigned by management

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


2+ years of experience in large-scale ReactJS applications/NodeJS/Next.JS
Good knowledge of JavaScript ES6/TypeScript
Solid experience in all areas of web development (HTML5, CSS3/Ant design, Bootstrap, JSON), including accessibility and security concerns
Solid experience in modern front-end build pipelines and tools (e.g., Git, Webpack, NPM)
Proficiency in Redux, Redux-Saga
Experience in using front-end testing and test runners (eg, Mocha/Chai/Jest)
Experience in using LLM Coding tools (Claude Code/ Codex / etc.)
Good experience in Agile (Scrum model) development environments
Well-versed in writing structured, well-documented, maintainable, and clean code
Excellent in problem-solving and analytical skills
Development experience in games/ mobile games is an advantage
Proactively leveraging AI tools to boost productivity and code quality
Able to work independently and without minimum supervision
Good command of English
Great attitude and work ethic
Plus:
Experience in Cloud computing, such as Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure
Experience in setting up, using, or configuring CI/CD pipelines and tools (e.g., Git, Ansible, Jenkins, NPM,...)
Experience with GraphQL and micro frontend architecture
Prior experience in e-commerce or high-traffic consumer platforms

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


At Gear Games, we value talent and strive to create an engaging and caring working environment as we appreciate our employees' hard work and dedication. We understand that mental health is as important as financial well-being. We offer an attractive compensation and benefit package, as well as so many fun and exciting activities to engage employees, boost their topmost creativity and productivity at work, including but not limited to:
Attractive salary with full pay during the probationary period;
The company covers 100% of social insurance costs based on the full salary.
Performance bonus, profit sharing at the end of the year.
Lunch allowance and personal events care, premium healthcare insurance and mental health services;
Flexible working time and hybrid work, optional standing desks, modern hardware, no dress code, pantry area with complimentary drinks, snacks and fruit;
Ability to improve your English or Vietnamese with a native teacher during working time;
Complimentary in-house gym and games room. Our employees enjoy playing board games, video games, PS5, ping pong, football tables, and VR games.
Many exciting internal activities and clubs.
Depending on the job type and location, the offered benefit package may vary.
We are a fun and international working environment where work is play. If you want to be a part of our team, apply now!

title: Android Developer (Kotlin)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Are you an experienced 
(Senior) Android Engineer
 looking for your next career move? Do you have a background in 
design & architecture 
and 
development of digital products
? If so read on.
The team:
You will be part of our Digital Delivery Hub who are responsible for designing, developing and maintaining some of the most interesting and innovative digital apps within the financial services space that are at the forefront of the market. Our Hub is focused on building a world class User Experience, Design and Web / Mobile Development team that can work with the business to realise an exciting digital strategy.
The role:
We are looking for a talented
 (Senior) Android Developer
 who still does hands-on development to contribute in the development and execution of an innovative mobile banking solution in Asia. This will include the development of in-country and cross-border solutions across all facets of a mobile banking operation including customer experience and design, developing and implementing new products and services, process engineering and other functional deliverable. Risk management and technology innovation will be essential for your success.
You will be responsible for technically leading and coaching our engineers who work in cross-functional delivery teams to design and build best-of-breed mobile solutions whilst maintaining necessary support for ongoing products.
Your duties will be to:
Provide hands-on technical leadership and development in mobile solution development – you will get your hands dirty.
Provide a leading voice in the evolving mobile architecture framework and road-map covering languages, tooling, patterns and delivery processes.
Enhance our talent pool ensuring that our team’s skills and practices are leading edge and aligned to technology strategy.
Provide technical guidance through the complete 
Solution Development Life Cycle
.
Developing solution architectures aligned with enterprise-wide standards to ensure successful implementation of technology solutions.
Lead the technical design process coordinating various stakeholders; develop and document solution architectures for projects aligned to bank’s standards and policies.
Custodian of 
design and engineering best practices
; and technical app road-maps.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Technical Skills:
At least 
3 years of experience in Android.
Good understanding of modern Android architecture like 
MVVM, MVI
, etc.
Having experience developing both Android and iOS applications is a plus.
Willingness to learn iOS stuff and apply it to feature development.
Having an app in Google Play or the Apple App Store is a plus.
Having experience in 
KMM
 development is a big plus.
Having experience integrating mobile apps with web services, such as Firebase.
Having experience in 
automation tests and unit tests
.
Having experience in 
memory and performance solving
.
Having experience with 
Dexguard, Proguard, or Dexprotector
 is a plus.
Having experience with 
Design System
 is a plus.
Having experience with 
Feature Flagging
 is a plus, such as 
Firebase, LaunchDarkly
.
Must have experience developing for multiple screen sizes and densities.
Experience with developing custom UI for native components.
Familiar with trending frameworks and libraries.
Good at finding and using third-party open-source libraries.
 
Soft skills:
Strong willingness to learn new practices and technologies.
Able to work well in the team and willing to mentor/coach others.
Exceptional interpersonal skills, including facilitation and negotiation.
Understanding and experience of Agile methodology.
Experience in working across several technical domains with the ability to ‘deep dive’ where required and ensure correct solutions are implemented.
Ability to translate technical talk to the business.
Ability to deliver convincing presentations that provide significant insight and generate consensus and buy-in.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


You’ll love working with us if you are:
Passionate about technology.
Independent but also a good team player.
Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity.
Focused on usability and speed.
Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.
At 
TYME,
 opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership.
Some of our benefits:
Meal and parking allowances
 are covered by the company.
Full benefits and salary rank during probation
.
Insurances
 such as Vietnamese labor law and 
premium health care
 for you and your family.
SMART goals and clear career opportunities
 (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development.
Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture.
Overseas travel opportunities
 for training and work-related.
Internal Hackathons and company events
 (team building, coffee run, etc.).
13th salary 
Performance-based bonus and equity participation in GoTyme Group
15-day annual + 3-day sick leave
 per year from the company.
Work-life balance 
40-hr per week
 from 
Mon to Fri
.

title: Software Engineer II (Java/ Golang/ PHP/ Python)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Global Fashion Group
 is the leading fashion and lifestyle destination in growth markets across LATAM, SEA and ANZ, listed in the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. From our people to our customers and partners, we exist to empower everyone to express their true selves through fashion. Our three e-commerce platforms: Dafiti, ZALORA and THE ICONIC connect an assortment of international, local and own brands to over 800 million consumers from diverse cultures and lifestyles. GFG’s platforms provide seamless and inspiring customer experiences from discovery to delivery, powered by art & science that is infused with unparalleled local knowledge. As part of the Group’s vision is to be the #1 online destination for fashion & lifestyle in growth markets, we are committed to doing this responsibly by being people and planet positive across everything we do.
 
ABOUT THE TEAM 
The Marketing by GFG, was launched in 2020 to accelerate brands’ growth and exposure efficiently. Our vision is to be the most efficient media solution for brands to invest and grow their business across our regions. The product helped the brands to drive more sales faster with a reduced cost. MbG is not aimed to support the brands only, it's also a great tool for marketplace Sellers to improve the listings visibility and afford an important margin.
 
WHAT WILL YOU DO
Work in an agile environment to develop a best-in-market experience.
Write and maintain clean and well-tested code
Work on distributed systems at scale with high traffic workloads
Collaborate with other software engineers and stakeholders in your team to build and maintain APIs in our microservices architecture (Kubernetes)

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


BS/MS in Computer Science or related technical discipline.
4+ years of experience with high-traffic distributed systems and client-server architectures.
A solid foundation in computer science, with strong competency in data
structures, and algorithms
Proficiency in one high-level programming language such as Java, Python, Golang, PHP,...
Familiarity with a testing framework
Experience designing and building APIs.
Experience with distributed systems and client-server architectures.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


#1 IT company to work for in Vietnam in 2021
Best practice scaled agile engineering
Amazing office and great culture! Massage chairs, table tennis, video game room, quarterly team events, yearly company trip, end of the year party
Hybrid working environment and work from home set up allowance
Clear career progression plan and support
Macbook or laptop when you start
Social insurance, medical insurance & AON insurance
13th month salary
15 days of annual leave, 30 days of sick leave/mental health, 1 day of occasion leave
Apply today and join GFG in this exciting role shaping the face of fashion e-commerce!
Global Fashion Group embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.

title: AI-Powered Principal Fullstack Engineer (Java/Go/RoR)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


About the role
An 
implementer
 who takes direction from product and domain experts, uses 
generative AI (LLMs)
, 
no-code/low-code
, and 
hands-on engineering
 to move from “what to build” to 
working prototypes and initial implementations
 in days —not weeks. This role bridges 
product, UX, and engineering
: you shape the “how” at maximum speed, then hand off 
testable, specified
 work to the broader engineering organization.
 
Responsibilities
Work from business requirements and constraints set with domain experts; design 
prompts and AI-assisted workflows
 and translate needs into 
clear system and UX specifications
.
Rapid prototyping
 (UI/UX mockups, thin vertical slices, foundational implementations) using AI tools, no-code/low-code, and code where it accelerates outcome.
Run 
hypothesis validation
 cycles on prototypes; deliver 
high-fidelity handovers
 (behaviour, data contracts, non-functional notes) to engineering teams.
Decode legacy specifications
 and extend existing products using AI-assisted analysis and implementation where appropriate.
Continuously evolve
 how the product team builds—tooling, templates, and practices—as models and platforms change.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


1. Full-stack engineering depth (required)
You are not only a prompt author: you 
ship
 full-stack software and can own thin slices end-to-end when the prototype must be real.
End-to-end feature development
: backend services and 
SPAs
; comfort moving across the stack for prototypes and v1 implementations.
Principal/Senior
 level at Backend OR Frontend (if you are good at Backend, FE can be intermediate, and in contrast) 
Backend:
 hands-on skills in 
Java, Golang or Ruby on Rails
; 
RESTful APIs
; sound approach to 
micro-services
 and backward compatibility where relevant; performance, concurrency, and 
clean structure
 in code.
Frontend:
 solid experience with modern frameworks such as 
React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, or Angular.js
; strong 
JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS
; awareness of 
testing
 (e.g. Jest/Mocha) and 
quality
 (linting, reviews).
Data:
 strong 
SQL
 skills and query tuning; 
ACID
-aware design for transactional behaviour in prototypes.
Delivery: CI/CD (e.g. GitHub Actions, CircleCI, or similar), Git workflows, code review habits; AWS and Docker for deployable prototypes; Kubernetes exposure is a plus.
Reliability and security in scope of the prototype: authentication/authorization patterns, JWT/OAuth2 at a level appropriate to demos and handover notes; SLO/SLI thinking and observability hooks where the prototype will graduate.
 
2. Required experience and skills (must have)
Minimum 8 years of experience
 in related roles: Fullstack Developer, AI Engineer, Backend Engineer, Architecture
Generative AI:
 
Enthusiastic, daily
 use of 
generative AI
 and 
advanced AI tooling
 to streamline work and 
materially accelerate
 delivery, combined with 
deep practical understanding of LLMs
 and 
proven application
 in product or internal delivery (not toy prompts only).
Product mindset: Proven track record translating high-level product requirements into detailed requirements and comprehensive technical requirements through close partnership with Product Managers and domain stakeholders.
Communication: Strong verbal and written English for clarity and alignment in distributed, multinational product engineering teams.
Prototyping and product iteration
 using 
AI tools and no-code/low-code
, grounded in 
user and operational workflow
 understanding.
Comfort with ambiguity: ship “something that works first,” then refine in tight loops (agile execution).
Track record as a central technical contributor on product initiatives that reached users and business outcomes.
Agile familiarity (Scrum/Kanban); strong problem-solving across technical and product uncertainty.
3. Preferred (nice to have)
Micro-frontends
, 
state machines
, advanced 
Ruby on Rails, Golang or Java
 concurrency.
Kubernetes
, 
Kafka/RabbitMQ
, 
Prometheus/Grafana/ELK
 or similar.
DDD, Clean/Hexagonal architecture
; experience in 
accounting, finance, or other domain-heavy
 B2B products.
Open-source or strong 
continuous learning
 profile.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Financial Benefits:
Attractive Salary Package
Insurance based on full salary (Social Insurance, Health Insurance, Unemployment Insurance)
Private health insurance and accident insurance for employees. Covering for family member, applied from manager level
Full salary during probation period
17 paid leaves per year

Hybrid working model with 2 working days in office per week
Annual Company trip and Quarterly Team building
Working in an international environment with nice and supportive colleagues
Work life balance environment
Sport clubs in the company for engagement activities: billiard club, running club
Career Development:
Clear Career path

Monthly and biannual Recognition Awards

title: CT2101- Backend/Fullstack Developer (C#, .NET, ReactJS)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Về vị trí này
Celltics Technology là startup công nghệ đến từ Hàn Quốc, chuyên phát triển giải pháp tự động hóa workflow cho ngành dược phẩm và công nghệ sinh học. Công ty cung cấp giải pháp tích hợp cả phần mềm và phần cứng, từ nền tảng điều khiển robot, phần mềm quản lý thiết bị, hệ thống API web-based, đến các thiết bị quang học chính xác như kính hiển vi, mô-đun quang phổ và thiết bị phục vụ nghiên cứu – sản xuất trong lĩnh vực biotech/pharma. Thông qua mạng lưới đối tác, Celltics Technology hiện đã cung cấp giải pháp cho hơn 10 công ty dược phẩm lớn và viện nghiên cứu toàn cầu.
Địa điểm làm việc: Đà Nẵng, Hà Nội, TP. Hồ Chí Minh
Văn phòng:
- Đà Nẵng: Đường Trần Đại Nghĩa, P. Hòa Quý
- Hà Nội: Đường Quang Trung, P. Hà Đông
- TP.HCM: Đường Số 8, KĐT Phú Mỹ Hưng, P. Tân Mỹ
Trách nhiệm
Về vị trí này
Ở vị trí này, bạn sẽ tham gia phát triển các hệ thống phần mềm phục vụ tự động hóa thiết bị trong ngành dược phẩm và công nghệ sinh học. Công việc phù hợp với ứng viên yêu thích sản phẩm công nghệ ứng dụng thực tế, muốn làm việc với hệ thống có kết nối giữa phần mềm, dữ liệu và thiết bị tự động hóa.
Mô tả công việc
- Phát triển hệ thống quản lý dữ liệu cho các thiết bị dược phẩm / biotech.
- Xây dựng dashboard để theo dõi, hiển thị và phân tích dữ liệu vận hành thiết bị.
- Thiết kế và phát triển web-based API cho các giải pháp tự động hóa.
- Phát triển phần mềm điều khiển các mô-đun tự động hóa.
- Phối hợp với team sản phẩm để hiểu nhu cầu người dùng và cải thiện trải nghiệm sử dụng.
- Làm việc với các thành phần phần mềm liên quan đến thiết bị, dữ liệu, giao diện quản trị và vận hành hệ thống.
- Tham gia đưa ra giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp với sản phẩm và yêu cầu thực tế từ khách hàng.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Yêu cầu ứng viên
Ứng viên chỉ cần phù hợp một trong hai nhóm kỹ năng dưới đây:
Nhóm Backend
- Có từ 4 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển với C#.
- Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng .NET 5.0 trở lên.
- Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng web service, API hoặc hệ thống backend.
- Có tư duy tốt về cấu trúc hệ thống, xử lý dữ liệu và logic nghiệp vụ.
Hoặc nhóm Frontend / Full-stack
- Có từ 4 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển với React.
- Thành thạo JavaScript / TypeScript.
- Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng giao diện web, dashboard hoặc hệ thống quản trị.
- Có khả năng phối hợp với backend/API để phát triển sản phẩm hoàn chỉnh.
Yêu cầu chung
- Có khả năng hiểu sản phẩm và đưa ra quyết định hợp lý dựa trên nhu cầu khách hàng.
- Có tư duy chủ động, trách nhiệm và sẵn sàng làm việc trong môi trường startup công nghệ.
- Có khả năng giao tiếp bằng tiếng Anh hoặc tiếng Hàn.
Điểm cộng
- Từng phát triển dashboard, hệ thống quản lý dữ liệu hoặc web-based API.
- Có kinh nghiệm với hệ thống điều khiển thiết bị, automation, robotics hoặc IoT.
- Quan tâm đến lĩnh vực dược phẩm, biotech, lab automation hoặc thiết bị nghiên cứu.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với team Hàn Quốc hoặc môi trường quốc tế.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Quyền lợi
- Mức lương khoảng 23–24 triệu VND/tháng gross, thỏa thuận theo năng lực.
- Cơ hội làm việc với startup công nghệ Hàn Quốc trong lĩnh vực đang phát triển mạnh: pharma/biotech automation.
- Tham gia phát triển sản phẩm có ứng dụng thực tế trong phòng lab, nghiên cứu và sản xuất.
- Môi trường làm việc linh hoạt, bắt đầu làm việc từ 9:00–9:30.
- Hỗ trợ bữa trưa, bữa tối khi làm thêm.
- Có ngày phép năm, nghỉ nửa ngày và các chế độ nghỉ phép theo chính sách công ty.
- Hỗ trợ chi phí học tập, đào tạo, mua sách.
- Văn hóa làm việc cởi mở, phẳng, khuyến khích chia sẻ ý kiến.
- Có quà dịp lễ và hỗ trợ hiếu hỉ.

title: Middle UX Designer (UI-UX, Android, iOS, Mobile Apps)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Role Overview:
We are looking for a highly motivated 
Mid-Level UX Designer
 to help craft intuitive, user-centric experiences for the Motorist Super App. You will be directly involved in simplifying the car ownership journey, designing features that range from real-time traffic updates to vehicle valuation tools. You will work closely with Product Managers, Engineers, and stakeholders to deliver smart solutions that our community of drivers loves.
Key Responsibilities:
End-to-End Design
: Create user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI mockups for iOS, Android, and Web platforms.
User Research & Testing:
 Conduct user research, A/B testing, and usability testing with vehicle owners and dealer partners to gather actionable insights.
Cross-Functional Collaboration:
 Partner closely with developers and product managers to ensure designs are implemented accurately and function seamlessly.
Design Systems:
 Contribute to the maintenance and evolution of Motorist’s design system, ensuring visual consistency across all touchpoints.
Problem Solving:
 Challenge the status quo, iterating quickly based on user feedback and business requirements.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


2 to 3 years
 of hands-on experience in UX/UI design, with a strong focus on 
mobile applications (iOS and Android).
A solid portfolio showcasing end-to-end design processes, problem-solving skills, and clean, modern UI design.
Proficiency in industry-standard design and prototyping tools (e.g., Figma, FigJam).
Experience in conducting basic user research and translating qualitative/quantitative data into design improvements.
A team player with excellent communication skills who thrives in a fast-paced, high-growth startup environment.
Proficiency in English is required to communicate with our headquarters in Singapore.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Competitive salary with annual performance review and 13th-month bonus: 
18-30M
Modern working devices: MacBook, monitor, Android test phones, etc.
PVI Health Insurance and full social insurance as per Vietnam Labor Law.
15 days annual leave, increasing by 1 day per year.
English language training sponsored by the company.
Professional development and opportunities to travel to Singapore for training.
Friendly, innovative, and young working environment in District 2, Ho Chi Minh City.
Working hours: 7 hours/day, Monday to Friday (no weekends).
Year-end party and team-building activities.
Unlimited potential for career growth and internal advancement.

title: AI Automation Engineer (JavaScript, Python, LLM)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We're building an internal AI platform that empowers every department—from Product and Marketing to Operations, Customer Service and HR—to eliminate repetitive work, improve decision-making and accelerate execution through automation and AI.
We're looking for an AI Automation Engineer to help build that future.
What you’ll build:
AI tools that help Product, Marketing, Design, Operations and other teams work faster and smarter.
Intelligent workflows that automate complex business processes across the organization.
Internal AI systems built from real business knowledge, data and operational workflows.
End-to-end automations that connect AI with Shopify, ERP, CRM and other business platforms.
Scalable AI solutions that continuously improve through experimentation and business feedback.
What you’ll do:

title: QA Engineer (Python, Automation, AI, ML)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are seeking a diligent and detail-oriented QA Engineer to join our R&D team. The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of our model and core engines. You will play a key role in building testing infrastructure, benchmarking models, and defining complex data scenarios to predict how model performance impacts the final product.
 
Key Responsibilities:
Test Automation Architecture: 
Design, develop, and optimize scalable automated testing frameworks for core engines. Focus on streamlining model benchmarking, regression suites, and performance profiling.
Data Engineering for QA: 
Architect comprehensive data strategies. Define and synthesize complex data contexts and edge-case scenarios required to stress-test ML model robustness.
End-to-End Risk Analysis: 
Evaluate model outputs through a product lens. Predict systemic risks and quantify how model variance impacts the final user experience post-integration.
CI/CD Integration: 
Seamlessly integrate automated validation gates into the CI/CD pipeline to ensure continuous quality delivery for cloud-connected and embedded components.
Cross-functional Collaboration: 
Work closely with Data and Dev teams to triage defects, analyze root causes, and refine model training requirements based on QA insights.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Technical Requirements:
Experience: Minimum
 3 years in Software Quality Engineering or Backend Development, with a focus on automation.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Engineering, or a related technical field.
Programming Mastery: Proficient in 
Python
 (for automation & ML scripting) and C++ or JavaScript (for engine-level or web-integrated testing).
Domain Expertise: Solid understanding of 
AI/ML lifecycles
 and Computer Vision fundamentals.
Hands-on experience with 
cloud platforms
 (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and IoT/Robotics environments.
 
Preferred Qualifications:
Proactive Problem Solving: Proven track record of architecting test frameworks from scratch.
Agile Proficiency: Experience in Scrum/Agile environments with a focus on rapid iteration.
AI-Driven Productivity: Experience leveraging LLMs or AI-based coding assistants to accelerate test script generation and data synthesis.
Communication: Ability to translate complex technical risks into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.
ML Analytics: Ability to calculate and interpret core metrics (mAP, Precision/Recall, F1-score, etc.) to assess model performance beyond simple "pass/fail" results.
Toolchain: Proficiency with Git, Jira, TestRail, and modern CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, or GitHub Actions).
Ability to communicate verbally and written in English language.
 
#R64005

=== Job description ===
Job description


Work in small, highly collaborative agile teams. You and the team will have a clear mission and ownership of an important outcome that supports company and our customers.
Align with stakeholders on best practices around APIs, security, compliance, roadmap, and reliability.
Help drive the technical direction of software features.
Build highly scalable, reliable, and maintainable APIs to handle high-volume transactions.
We aim for teams that are inclusive, helpful, and have a strong sense of ownership for the things they build.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Knowledge of professional software engineering practices for the full development life cycle (coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, operation, monitoring, etc.).
With at least 8+ years of experience working in software development, we also welcome strong candidates having fewer years of experience.
Preferably with 3+ years of experience in Java. We also welcome other general-purpose programming languages but are not limited to Java.
Understanding of system design and tuning for high performance, scalability, and reliability.
Strong database and schema design for large-scale and finance systems.
Great problem-solving abilities.
Experience with microservices architecture.
Experience with event-driven architecture or message queue system
Professional experience working with cloud (either AWS, Azure, or GCP).
Experience in enterprise architecture.
Working proficiency in English.
Qualifications:
B.Sc or M.Sc in Computer Science or a related discipline with proven “hands-on” development experience

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Our client 
is a fast-scaling Fintech platform enabling seamless banking solutions across emerging markets. They blend innovation with scalable tech infrastructure to help millions access secure, intuitive financial services. Operating in a highly dynamic international environment, the company offers a sustainable professional space with a clear focus on technological excellence, agile culture, and continuous human development.
Why You’ll Love Working Here
Financial Package:
 13th-month salary pro-rata, attractive performance bonuses of up to 2 months, 100% salary during probation, and fully covered meal and parking allowances.
Work-Life Balance:
 Strictly 40-hour workweek (Monday to Friday) in a Hybrid setup, plus a generous leave package of 20 days 
Health Care:
 Premium health care package provided for both you and your family right from the start (no seniority required)
Career Growth:
 Clear career acceleration through SMART goals, supported by technical seminars, conferences, career talks, and exclusive overseas travel opportunities for training and work.
Engagement:
 A vibrant, values-driven international culture featuring internal Hackathons, dynamic company events (team building, coffee runs, blue card), and a highly agile working environment.

title: Tech Lead (MDM, Golang, Java, IOS)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


1. THÔNG TIN CHUNG / GENERAL INFORMATION
Tên vị trí / Position:        Tech Lead
Phòng ban / Department:        Kỹ thuật (Engineering)
Báo cáo cho / Report to:        Engineering Manager / CTO
Số lượng / Headcount:        1-2
Cấp bậc / Level:        Tech Lead
2. MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC / JOB PURPOSE
Dẫn dắt đội ngũ kỹ thuật phát triển sản phẩm MDM, định hướng kiến trúc hệ thống và lựa chọn công nghệ. Chịu trách nhiệm về chất lượng, hiệu năng, bảo mật của toàn bộ sản phẩm; hướng dẫn, đào tạo đội ngũ và đảm bảo tiến độ giao hàng. Đóng vai trò chủ chốt trong việc xây dựng sản phẩm MDM cạnh tranh tại thị trường Việt Nam và khu vực.
Lead the engineering team in developing MDM products, drive architectural decisions and technology choices. Own the quality, performance, and security of the entire product; mentor team members and ensure on-time delivery. Play a key role in building a competitive MDM product for the Vietnamese and regional markets.
3. TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH / KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Thiết kế kiến trúc tổng thể (high-level & low-level design) cho hệ thống MDM: backend services, admin console, mobile agent.
Design high-level and low-level architecture for the entire MDM system: backend services, admin console, and mobile agent.
Định hướng lựa chọn công nghệ, framework, thư viện cho từng module; ra quyết định build vs buy.
Drive technology, framework, and library selection across modules; make build-vs-buy decisions.
Dẫn dắt đội 4-8 developer: phân chia công việc, mentor, code review, đánh giá hiệu suất.
Lead a team of 4–8 developers: task allocation, mentoring, code review, and performance evaluation.
Chịu trách nhiệm cuối cùng về chất lượng code, kiến trúc bảo mật và hiệu năng hệ thống.
Ultimately responsible for code quality, security architecture, and overall system performance.\
Thiết kế và rà soát các luồng bảo mật cốt lõi: enrollment, attestation, key provisioning, certificate lifecycle, secure OTA.
Design and review core security flows: enrollment, attestation, key provisioning, certificate lifecycle, and secure OTA.\
Làm việc trực tiếp với Product Manager, Security Team, DevOps để phân tích yêu cầu, ước lượng và lập kế hoạch sprint/release.
Collaborate directly with Product Managers, Security Team, and DevOps on requirement analysis, estimation, and sprint/release planning.
Xây dựng và duy trì coding standards, branching strategy, CI/CD pipeline, quy trình release.
Establish and maintain coding standards, branching strategy, CI/CD pipelines, and release processes.
Phân tích sự cố production nghiêm trọng, dẫn dắt root cause analysis và đề xuất giải pháp dài hạn.
Triage major production incidents, lead root cause analysis, and propose long-term fixes.
Đại diện kỹ thuật làm việc với khách hàng lớn, đối tác, nhà cung cấp HSM/PKI khi cần.
Act as the technical representative with key clients, partners, and HSM/PKI vendors when needed.
Theo dõi xu hướng công nghệ (Android Enterprise, Apple Business Manager, Zero Trust, PQC) và đưa ra lộ trình áp dụng.
Track technology trends (Android Enterprise, Apple Business Manager, Zero Trust, PQC) and propose adoption roadmaps.
Đào tạo nội bộ, nâng cấp kiến thức bảo mật và kỹ năng cho team.
Conduct internal training to upskill the team in security and engineering best practices.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


4. YÊU CẦU / REQUIREMENTS
4.1. Học vấn / Education
Cử nhân/Thạc sĩ CNTT, Khoa học máy tính, An toàn thông tin hoặc tương đương. Các chứng chỉ liên quan (CISSP, CEH, AWS, GCP) là một lợi thế.
Bachelor's or Master's degree in IT, Computer Science, Information Security, or equivalent. Relevant certifications (CISSP, CEH, AWS, GCP) are a plus.
4.2. Kinh nghiệm / Experience
Tối thiểu 6-8 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, trong đó có ít nhất 2 năm ở vai trò Tech Lead hoặc tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt team ≥ 4 người và đã đưa ít nhất một sản phẩm bảo mật/mobile/MDM ra production.
At least 6–8 years of software development experience, including 2+ years as a Tech Lead or equivalent. Proven experience leading a team of 4+ engineers and shipping at least one security/mobile/MDM product to production.
4.3. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật / Technical Skills
a) Phát triển phần mềm / Software Development
Backend:
 Chuyên sâu Golang/Java, microservices, message queue (Kafka/RabbitMQ/NATS), gRPC, RESTful API, SQL/NoSQL, caching, distributed systems.
Frontend:
 Hiểu sâu React.js/Vue.js, TypeScript, state management, performance optimization; có khả năng review code và định hướng kiến trúc UI.
Mobile:
 Thành thạo Android (Kotlin) và/hoặc iOS (Swift); hiểu rõ Android Enterprise (Device Owner, Profile Owner, Work Profile) và Apple MDM protocol (DEP, VPP, ABM, ASM).
Cloud & Infra:
 AWS/GCP/Azure ở mức kiến trúc; Kubernetes, Terraform, observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, OpenTelemetry).
DevSecOps:
 CI/CD nâng cao, SAST/DAST/SCA, secret management, supply chain security (SLSA, SBOM).
Phương pháp:
 Agile/Scrum, system design, architectural decision records (ADR), threat modeling (STRIDE, PASTA).
b) Bảo mật phần cứng & Trusted Execution / Hardware Security & Trusted Execution
Hiểu sâu và có khả năng thiết kế giải pháp khai thác các chip/môi trường bảo mật trên thiết bị; có thể đánh giá rủi ro và đưa ra lựa chọn kiến trúc phù hợp:
Deep expertise in on-device security chips/environments with the ability to architect, evaluate trade-offs, and make sound design choices:
Apple Secure Enclave (SEP):
 kiến trúc SEP, lifecycle khóa qua kSecAttrTokenIDSecureEnclave, biometric-bound keys, DataProtection classes, Keychain ACL; thiết kế các tính năng MDM khai thác SEP cho Apple devices.
Architect SEP-based features: key lifecycle, biometric-bound keys, DataProtection classes, and Keychain ACLs across the MDM stack on Apple devices.
Android StrongBox & TEE:
 Android Keystore với StrongBox, phân biệt software/TEE/StrongBox-backed keys, ID/Key Attestation, Verified Boot state; đánh giá tương thích trên dải thiết bị OEM khác nhau.
Design StrongBox/TEE-based features, perform key/ID attestation, and assess compatibility across OEM device fleets.
TPM 2.0:
 PCR, sealed storage, remote attestation, EK/AIK certificates; thiết kế desktop MDM agent và mô hình device identity dựa trên TPM.
Architect desktop MDM agents and TPM-based device identity using PCRs, sealed storage, and EK/AIK certificates.
HSM & Cloud KMS:
 thiết kế và vận hành hệ thống quản lý khóa với HSM on-prem (Thales, Utimaco) hoặc cloud KMS (AWS KMS/CloudHSM, GCP KMS, Azure Key Vault) qua PKCS#11/KMIP; lập kế hoạch high availability, disaster recovery cho key material.
Architect key management with on-prem HSMs or cloud KMS via PKCS#11/KMIP; plan HA/DR for cryptographic key material.
Mô hình tin cậy phân tầng: 
Root of Trust → Secure Boot → Verified Boot → Attestation; thiết kế cơ chế kiểm tra tính toàn vẹn của fleet thiết bị, xử lý tampered/rooted/jailbroken devices.
Design integrity verification across the device fleet and handle tampered/rooted/jailbroken endpoints.
c) Mã hoá & Mật mã học ứng dụng / Cryptography & Applied Cryptography
Có khả năng đưa ra quyết định mật mã ở cấp độ kiến trúc, lựa chọn nguyên hàm phù hợp và rà soát code/cấu hình của team:
Able to make cryptographic decisions at the architectural level, select appropriate primitives, and review the team's implementations and configurations:
Mã hoá đối xứng: 
AES-GCM/GCM-SIV/CBC/CTR, ChaCha20-Poly1305; nắm chắc nonce management, AEAD design, padding oracle, timing attacks.
AES-GCM/GCM-SIV/CBC/CTR, ChaCha20-Poly1305; mastery of nonce management, AEAD design, padding oracle, and timing attacks.
Mã hoá bất đối xứng:
 RSA (PKCS#1 v1.5, OAEP, PSS) ≥ 2048-bit, hiểu rõ pitfalls; có thể tư vấn migration plan từ RSA sang ECC.
RSA (PKCS#1 v1.5, OAEP, PSS) ≥ 2048 bits with deep understanding of pitfalls; able to advise on migration from RSA to ECC.
Elliptic Curve:
 ECDSA, EdDSA (Ed25519), ECDH/X25519, NIST P-256/P-384, Curve25519; chọn đúng curve theo ngữ cảnh mobile, IoT, server.
ECDSA, EdDSA (Ed25519), ECDH/X25519 across NIST and Curve25519 families; pick curves appropriate to mobile, IoT, or server contexts.
Hash, MAC, KDF:
 SHA-2/3, BLAKE2/3, HMAC, HKDF, PBKDF2, Argon2, scrypt; thiết kế đúng KDF cho từng use case (password, key derivation, session keys).
SHA-2/3, BLAKE2/3, HMAC, and KDFs (HKDF, PBKDF2, Argon2, scrypt) with correct selection per use case.
Mật mã hậu lượng tử (PQC):
 hiểu ML-KEM (Kyber), ML-DSA (Dilithium), hybrid schemes; có thể xây dựng PQC roadmap cho sản phẩm MDM.
Understand ML-KEM (Kyber), ML-DSA (Dilithium), hybrid schemes, and build a PQC roadmap for the MDM product.
Thư viện chuẩn: 
Tink, libsodium, BoringSSL, BouncyCastle, JCA/JCE, CryptoKit; nghiêm cấm và rà soát các trường hợp tự cài đặt thuật toán trong team.
Mandate well-vetted libraries (Tink, libsodium, BoringSSL, BouncyCastle, JCA/JCE, CryptoKit) and audit against custom cryptography.
d) Mã hoá dữ liệu & Chữ ký số / Data Encryption & Digital Signatures
Thiết kế và sở hữu kiến trúc bảo vệ dữ liệu end-to-end trong toàn bộ hệ thống MDM:
Own the end-to-end data protection architecture across the entire MDM system:
Encryption at rest:
 FDE, FBE (Android), FileVault/APFS, envelope encryption (DEK/KEK), AES-KW (RFC 5649); thiết kế chiến lược lưu trữ và xoay vòng khóa.
FDE, FBE (Android), FileVault/APFS, envelope encryption (DEK/KEK), AES-KW; design key storage and rotation strategy.
Encryption in transit:
 TLS 1.2/1.3, mTLS server↔agent, certificate pinning, OCSP stapling, HSTS; thiết kế phòng thủ trước downgrade, MITM, BEAST, CRIME.
TLS 1.2/1.3, mTLS server↔agent, certificate pinning, OCSP stapling, HSTS; design defenses against downgrade, MITM, BEAST, and CRIME.
PKI & quản lý chứng thư số: 
X.509, CSR, chain validation, OCSP/CRL, SCEP, EST, ACME; thiết kế và vận hành internal CA cho MDM enrollment ở quy mô fleet lớn.
Design and operate an internal CA for MDM enrollment at fleet scale.
Chữ ký số:
 ký command/policy server→agent, firmware/OTA, APK/IPA signing & verification, timestamping (RFC 3161), JWT/JWS/JWE/COSE.
Sign commands/policies, firmware/OTA, APK/IPA, with timestamping and JWT/JWS/JWE/COSE for API authentication.
Key management lifecycle
: generation, distribution, rotation, revocation, escrow, destruction; tách bạch signing/encryption keys; tuân thủ NIST SP 800-57.
Full key lifecycle with separation of signing and encryption keys, in line with NIST SP 800-57.
Secure channels & protocols:
 Noise, Signal Protocol, Double Ratchet cho secure messaging server↔agent khi cần.
Noise, Signal Protocol, Double Ratchet for secure server↔agent messaging when required.
Threat modeling & secure SDLC:
 STRIDE, LINDDUN, abuse cases; xây dựng quy trình review bảo mật cho từng tính năng.
Embed STRIDE/LINDDUN/abuse-case threat modeling into the SDLC for every feature.
Hiểu sâu các tiêu chuẩn & chứng nhận: FIPS 140-2/140-3, Common Criteria, NIST SP 800-series, ISO 27001, SOC 2, và quy định mật mã Việt Nam (Nghị định 53/2022/NĐ-CP, tiêu chuẩn của Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ). Có khả năng dẫn dắt team đạt các chứng nhận này.
In-depth knowledge of FIPS 140-2/140-3, Common Criteria, NIST SP 800-series, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and Vietnamese cryptographic regulations; able to lead the team toward these certifications.
4.4. Kỹ năng mềm / Soft Skills
Lãnh đạo và truyền cảm hứng cho team kỹ thuật.
Leadership and ability to inspire an engineering team.
Tư duy hệ thống, ra quyết định dựa trên dữ liệu và rủi ro.
Systems thinking with data- and risk-driven decision making.
Giao tiếp tốt với cả stakeholder kỹ thuật và phi kỹ thuật.
Effective communication with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Tư duy bảo mật (security mindset) ở mức kiến trúc; luôn đặt câu hỏi "kẻ tấn công sẽ làm gì?".
Architectural-level security mindset — always asking "what would an attacker do?"
Kỹ năng mentor, đào tạo và phát triển đội ngũ.
Strong mentoring, training, and team development skills.
Tiếng Anh đọc/viết tốt; giao tiếp với đối tác nước ngoài là một lợi thế.
Strong written English; spoken English with foreign partners is a plus.
5. KPI ĐO LƯỜNG HIỆU QUẢ / KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS
KPI 1:
 Đảm bảo ≥ 90% sprint goals của team đạt được theo cam kết.
Ensure ≥ 90% of team sprint goals are met as committed.
KPI 2:
 Code coverage trung bình của team ≥ 80%; không có vùng critical < 70%.
Team-wide code coverage ≥ 80%; no critical module below 70%.
KPI 3:
 Số production incident nghiêm trọng (Sev-1/Sev-2) ≤ 2/quý.
≤ 2 Sev-1/Sev-2 production incidents per quarter.
KPI 4:
 Không có lỗ hổng Critical/High trên sản phẩm MDM khi pentest định kỳ.
Zero Critical/High vulnerabilities in MDM products during periodic pentests.
KPI 5:
 ≥ 2 thành viên trong team được promote hoặc đạt mục tiêu phát triển nghề nghiệp/năm.
≥ 2 team members promoted or hitting career goals per year.
KPI 6: 
Hoàn thành đúng hạn các milestone kiến trúc, security audit, certification theo roadmap.
Deliver architecture milestones, security audits, and certifications on the roadmap.
6. CÔNG CỤ SỬ DỤNG / TOOLSTACK
Cursor Pro + GitHub Copilot, Claude Pro, GitHub Team, Jira, Postman, Docker, BrowserStack, Figma.

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


7. QUYỀN LỢI / BENEFITS
Lương / Salary: 
Từ 60.000.000 – 90.000.000 đồng (thoả thuận theo năng lực).
VND 60,000,000 – 90,000,000 (negotiable based on capability).
Đóng đầy đủ BHXH – BHYT – BHTN trên mức lương.
Full Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance.
Lương tháng 13, thưởng Tết, thưởng dự án, hưởng theo hiệu quả công việc và milestone sản phẩm.
3th-month salary, Tet bonus, project bonuses, performance-based bonuses, and product milestone rewards.
Ngân sách học tập và đào tạo hằng năm
Annual learning and development budget
Các quyền lợi khác sẽ được nêu rõ khi phỏng vấn.
Other benefits to be discussed during the interview.
Thời gian làm việc / Working hours:
 Thứ 2 – Thứ 7, 8:00 – 17:00. 
Monday – Saturday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM.

title: Senior Java Developer (Spring/OOP)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are looking for a person, who can:
● Designing and estimating feature architecture based on the written specification.
● Implementing features full-stack (Java backend + ExtJS frontend + database migrations)
● Ensuring code quality through testing and code review
● Working independently with minimum guidance

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


You properly are a potential candidate for this position, if you have:
● Able to use AI tools to accelerate development
● Strong understanding of object-oriented design patterns.
● Fluency in Java 8+ and the related ecosystem.
● Solid experience with Spring Framework (dependency injection, transactions, security, scheduling)
● Solid experience with Hibernate/JPA (entity mapping, lazy/eager loading, cascading, HQL/JPQL)
● Good at JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
● Strong SQL skills and experience with database migration tools (Liquibase or Flyway)
● Experience with multi-threaded / concurrent programming
● Experience with Gradle or Maven build systems
● Able to quickly learn and work with new APIs, SDKs.
● Able to follow existing code standards.
● Able to write modules, clean and well-tested code.
● At least 5 years of experience in a relevant position.
● Intermediate+ English (reading specs, writing documentation, team communication)
● At least 1 year of mentoring, training, or managing experience.
You would be a strong candidate, if you have one of these following:
● Knowledge of virtualization concepts (VMs, snapshots, replication, hypervisor APIs)
● Experience with Linux administration and bash scripting
● Familiarity with PowerShell for Windows automation
● Experience with network programming (sockets, SSH, HTTP clients)
● Experience with SVN, Jira, and Confluence
● IntelliJ IDEA or VSCode
● Experience with large monolithic Java codebases

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


The Nakivo team in Vietnam has been changing very fast in the recent years, we have grown from a group of 6 engineers to the current team size of 80 and we are expecting to grow even more in the next following years. 
We welcome and embrace people, regardless of their background, religion, nationality or gender, but focus on diversity, contribution, determination and work ethic. At Nakivo, we are trying to improve everyday, to become a competitive choice for talented people, by offering
Flexible working hours: Office opens from 6.00 AM to 10.00 PM
Private health care package
Premium health care check
Gift (cash/voucher) for every special occasion: New Year's Eve, Tet holidays, International Women's Day, International Children's Day, Mid-Autumn Festival and Birthday
15-18 annual leaves/year, 5 sick leaves and additional leaves (up to 3 days)
Team building
Free and un-limited snack, tea, coffee and by-choice request.

title: Fullstack Developer (Java, Spring, ReactJS) - 2V069
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


Phát triển Hệ thống: 
Thiết kế và triển khai các dịch vụ Microservices hiệu năng cao phía Backend và giao diện người dùng (UI/UX) hiện đại phía Frontend.
Tối ưu hóa & Bảo mật:
 Quản lý giao dịch (transaction management) chặt chẽ, thiết lập cơ chế bảo mật API chuyên sâu (OAuth, RBAC) và tối ưu hóa tốc độ rendering phía Client.
Xây dựng Kiến trúc:
 Áp dụng kiến trúc hướng sự kiện (Event-driven) sử dụng Kafka hoặc SQS; đồng thời xây dựng các Single Page Applications (SPA) có khả năng mở rộng tốt.
Tích hợp End-to-End:
 Đảm bảo sự kết nối mượt mà giữa logic nghiệp vụ Backend và trải nghiệm người dùng Frontend thông qua RESTful APIs.
Vận hành & Troubleshooting:
 Chẩn đoán, truy vết và xử lý triệt để các sự cố trên toàn bộ Stack (từ Browser đến Database) trên môi trường Production.
Quy trình Agile:
 Tham gia chặt chẽ vào quy trình Agile/Scrum, phối hợp với đội ngũ UI/UX và Business Analyst để bàn giao sản phẩm chất lượng qua từng Sprint

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Kinh nghiệm:
 Ít nhất 
5+ năm kinh nghiệm
 phát triển phần mềm, 2+ năm kinh nghiệm với vị trí Fullstack developer với Java và các Javascript Framework hiện đại.
Backend Mastery: 
Thành thạo Java Core (OOP, Concurrency, Collections). Kinh nghiệm vững chắc về Spring Boot, Spring Data và Dependency Injection.
Frontend Mastery:
 Thành thạo React.js (hoặc Angular). Nắm vững TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3 (SASS/SCSS) và thiết kế Responsive.
State Management: 
Có kinh nghiệm quản lý trạng thái ứng dụng với Redux, Context API hoặc Zustand. Ưu tiên ứng viên biết sử dụng UI Libraries như Ant Design hoặc Tailwind CSS.
Microservices & Data:
 Kinh nghiệm thiết kế RESTful Microservices, hệ thống hướng sự kiện (Kafka) và thành thạo SQL (PostgreSQL, Oracle) cùng NoSQL (Redis, MongoDB).
Cloud & DevOps: 
Hiểu biết về AWS (EC2, EKS, Lambda), Docker/Kubernetes (K8s) và quy trình CI/CD (Jenkins, Harness).
Công cụ:
 Thành thạo Git và các công cụ giám sát, chẩn đoán hệ thống (Grafana, ELK, Chrome DevTools).

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


Làm việc trong các dự án chuyển đổi số mang tính CHIẾN LƯỢC & TIÊN PHONG của Tập đoàn với dạng ngành nghề, mảng công việc, có nhiều hướng lựa chọn phát triển chuyên môn...

Chế độ phúc lợi hấp dẫn: Nghỉ ngày sinh nhật, nghỉ mát định kỳ, giờ làm việc linh hoạt, gói Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp – TNG care…

title: Senior PHP Developer (Laravel)
description:
=== Job description ===
Job description


We are looking for a passionate Senior Laravel Developer with at least 5 years of experience to join our dynamic engineering team. We have adopted vibe coding as our core development process — AI coding agents now handle most of the hands-on implementation. Your role is to plan and architect: translating business requirements into clear technical specs, designing scalable system architecture, directing AI coding agents, and rigorously reviewing their output, while working closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality digital products.
 
Key Responsibilities
· Analyze business requirements and translate them into clear technical specifications and task breakdowns that AI coding agents can execute.
· Architect scalable, secure system designs and define coding standards and guardrails for AI-assisted (vibe coding) development.
· Direct and prompt AI coding agents to implement features, then rigorously review and validate the generated code for correctness, security, and performance.
· Plan and manage development tasks, sprints, and delivery timelines across the team.
· Optimize database design and backend architecture for performance and scalability.
· Identify and resolve complex performance, scalability, and integration issues that go beyond what AI agents can solve independently.
· Establish and enforce engineering best practices (testing, source control, CI/CD, design patterns) within an AI-assisted development workflow.
· Continuously evaluate new AI tools, agentic frameworks, and engineering practices to improve team productivity.

=== Your skills and experience ===
Your skills and experience


Must have
· At least 5 years of experience with PHP & Laravel Framework, with a strong foundation in system design and software architecture
· Strong understanding of MySQL, OOP, Design Patterns, and SOLID principles — solid enough to architect solutions and critically review code you didn’t write yourself. 
· Hands-on experience directing AI coding agents (e.g. Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor) in a vibe coding workflow — writing clear specs/prompts, orchestrating multi-step tasks, and validating AI-generated output. 
· Experience integrating AI using OpenAI APIs, LangChain, or vector databases.
· Strong planning and project management skills — able to break down ambiguous requirements into clear, actionable tasks and manage delivery timelines.
· Familiarity with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Vue.js, Git, Docker, or CI/CD pipelines, and hands-on familiarity with AI coding agents/IDEs is a plus. 
· Strong critical-thinking and architect mindset — comfortable making trade-off decisions, devising effective solutions, and catching issues AI agents miss.
· Good English communication skills (both written and spoken)
Nice to have
· Experience leading or mentoring a small engineering team.
· Familiarity with Agile/Scrum or other project management methodologies.
· Experience managing large-scale web services (B2B or B2C).
· Familiarity with big-data tools or chatbot technologies.
· Ability to view services from both business and engineering perspectives.
· Maintain a proactive mindset, focusing on what can be done rather than why it can’t be done.
Academic / Business
· Bachelor’s or associate degree in Computer Science or a related field.
· Ability to communicate in English (office communications are in English as CEO is from Japan)

=== Why you'll love working here ===
Why you'll love working here


·  Attractive salary
·  13th month salary.
·  Annual health check.
·  Annual company trip.
·  12 annual leave days (fully paid).
·  Social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance based on full gross salary.
·  Friendly, open, and collaborative working environment.
·  Great opportunity to work with English-speaking developers and advance your career.
 
Lets join and experience with us!
